headline: The Woodworkers You Don’t Want: Inside the World of Carpenter Ants with Orkin Canada
summary: Carpenter ants aren’t just a nuisance – what Canadian homeowners should know, with tips from Orkin Canada Orkin Carpenter Ants Carpenter ants don’t eat wood — they carve it. Learn how to spot, stop, and outsmart these silent invaders with Orkin Canada’s expert guide to identification, prevention, and elimination.
